_comment: Coolify deployment configuration for Leadsy. See docs/deployment/coolify-setup.md for step-by-step Coolify dashboard instructions.

required_environment_variables.description: Laravel application key. Generate with: php artisan key:generate --show. Must start with base64:
PostgreSQL password for the leads database user. Use a strong random value.
Password for the seeded super admin account. Must be changed before going live.
Email address for the seeded super admin account.
Run database migrations on every container start.
Run ProductionSeeder on every container start. Safe — uses updateOrCreate.
Run DemoSeeder (sample data). NEVER set true in production.
